subject: [PATCH v1 2/2] fuse: re-lock request before returning from fuse_ref_folio()

2026-05-19.patch_summary: This patch fixes a use-after-free issue in the fuse kernel module by re-locking the request before returning from the fuse_ref_folio() function, which unlocks the request but does not re-lock it. This ensures that the subsequent copy chain logic can safely access the request's arguments without encountering memory corruption issues. The fix is applied to the fs/fuse/dev.c file and addresses a problem introduced by a previous patch (c3021629a0d8) that added support for splice() reading from fuse devices.
